references.description: Security of processing when personal data is transmitted without encryption.
references.condition: The affected system processes personal data as defined by GDPR Art. 4

references.description: ICT security requiring encryption of data in transit for financial entities.
references.condition: The affected system is part of the ICT infrastructure of a financial entity subject to DORA

references.description: Encryption and cryptography policies covering data in transit.
references.condition: The entity is an essential or important entity subject to NIS2

references.description: Use of cryptography controls to protect data during transmission.
